svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="c00J4unUF1yF1QiuJI-m" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-804" dy="-137" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="LFLIX Full Implementation - Phase Roadmap (9 Weeks)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="700" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;" value="Phase 1: Reliability Foundation (Weeks 1-3)
- Testing baseline
- Structured logging
- Validation schemas
- Transactions
- CI gates" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="420" x="60" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;" value="Phase 2: Architecture & Performance (Weeks 4-6)
- Caching policy + TTL
- State/store refactor
- Typed API client
- Download persistence
- Perf instrumentation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="420" x="560" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=13;" value="Phase 3: Security, Mobile, Release Hardening (Weeks 7-9)
- Rate limiting + auth hardening
- Authorization audit
- Component standards
- Mobile/web flow unification
- Release automation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="460" x="1060" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="p2" value="Gate A: Reliability signoff"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="p3" value="Gate B: Perf + architecture signoff"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kpi" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;" value="Cross-phase KPIs: Coverage | API p50/p95 | Cache hit ratio | Download resume rate | Auth blocks" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="660" x="460" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.2;entryY=0;" target="kpi" value="track weekly"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="kpi" value="track weekly"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.8;entryY=0;" target="kpi" value="track weekly"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 25px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: LFLIX Full Implementation - Phase Roadmap (9 Weeks)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 418px; height: 1px; padding-top: 180px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Phase 1: Reliability Foundation (Weeks 1-3)
- Testing baseline
- Structured logging
- Validation schemas
- Transactions
- CI gates

div.div:
Phase 2: Architecture & Performance (Weeks 4-6)
- Caching policy + TTL
- State/store refactor
- Typed API client
- Download persistence
- Perf instrumentation

div.div:
Phase 3: Security, Mobile, Release Hardening (Weeks 7-9)
- Rate limiting + auth hardening
- Authorization audit
- Component standards
- Mobile/web flow unification
- Release automation
